---
title: "HADES Results Model"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{HADES Results Model}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 4
)

library(HadesResultsModel)
```

This vignette renders the latest HADES results model release.

```{r helpers, echo=FALSE}
resourceDir <- function(component) {
  installedPath <- system.file(component, package = "HadesResultsModel")
  if (nzchar(installedPath) && dir.exists(installedPath)) {
    return(installedPath)
  }

  devPath <- file.path("inst", component)
  if (dir.exists(devPath)) {
    return(normalizePath(devPath, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  }

  stop(sprintf("Could not locate package resource directory: %s", component))
}

findLatestRelease <- function(releasesDir) {
  releaseFiles <- list.files(
    releasesDir,
    pattern = "^release_v[0-9]{4}_Q[1-4]\\.ya?ml$",
    full.names = TRUE
  )

  if (length(releaseFiles) == 0) {
    stop("No release manifests found.")
  }

  versions <- sub("^release_(v[0-9]{4}_Q[1-4])\\.ya?ml$", "\\1", basename(releaseFiles))
  years <- as.integer(sub("^v([0-9]{4})_Q[1-4]$", "\\1", versions))
  quarters <- as.integer(sub("^v[0-9]{4}_Q([1-4])$", "\\1", versions))

  releaseFiles[[order(years, quarters)[[length(releaseFiles)]]]]
}

loadLatestReleaseModel <- function() {
  releasesDir <- resourceDir("releases")
  modulesDir <- resourceDir("modules")

  releaseFile <- findLatestRelease(releasesDir)
  manifest <- yaml::read_yaml(releaseFile)

  moduleNames <- names(manifest$modules)
  if (is.null(moduleNames) || !length(moduleNames)) {
    stop(sprintf("Invalid release manifest (no modules): %s", releaseFile))
  }

  moduleDefs <- lapply(moduleNames, function(moduleName) {
    moduleVersion <- as.character(manifest$modules[[moduleName]])
    defFile <- file.path(modulesDir, moduleName, moduleVersion, "definition.yaml")
    if (!file.exists(defFile)) {
      stop(sprintf("Definition file not found: %s", defFile))
    }
    yaml::read_yaml(defFile)
  })
  names(moduleDefs) <- moduleNames

  list(
    releaseFile = releaseFile,
    manifest = manifest,
    moduleDefinitions = moduleDefs
  )
}

model <- loadLatestReleaseModel()
```

# Latest release metadata

```{r release-metadata, echo=FALSE}
releaseInfo <- data.frame(
  field = c("Release version", "Release date", "Manifest file"),
  value = c(
    model$manifest$release_version,
    model$manifest$release_date,
    basename(model$releaseFile)
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

knitr::kable(releaseInfo, col.names = c("Field", "Value"))
```

# Module summary

```{r module-summary, echo=FALSE}
moduleSummary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(model$moduleDefinitions), function(moduleName) {
  moduleDef <- model$moduleDefinitions[[moduleName]]
  tableCount <- length(moduleDef$tables)
  fieldCount <- sum(vapply(moduleDef$tables, function(tbl) length(tbl$fields), integer(1)))

  data.frame(
    module = moduleName,
    version = as.character(model$manifest$modules[[moduleName]]),
    tables = tableCount,
    fields = fieldCount,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

moduleSummary <- moduleSummary[order(moduleSummary$module), ]
row.names(moduleSummary) <- NULL

knitr::kable(moduleSummary, col.names = c("Module", "Version", "# Tables", "# Fields"))
```


# Field-level details

```{r field-details, results = 'asis', echo=FALSE}
fieldValueToText <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x)) {
    return("")
  }
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return("")
  }
  if (is.list(x)) {
    return(paste(vapply(x, fieldValueToText, character(1)), collapse = ", "))
  }
  paste(as.character(x), collapse = ", ")
}

toFieldTable <- function(fields) {
  allKeys <- unique(unlist(lapply(fields, names)))
  preferred <- c("name", "type", "description", "is_primary_key", "references", "deprecated")
  orderedKeys <- c(preferred[preferred %in% allKeys], setdiff(allKeys, preferred))

  rows <- lapply(fields, function(field) {
    values <- setNames(as.list(rep("", length(orderedKeys))), orderedKeys)
    for (key in names(field)) {
      values[[key]] <- fieldValueToText(field[[key]])
    }
    as.data.frame(values, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  })

  out <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  displayNames <- gsub("_", " ", names(out))
  displayNames <- tools::toTitleCase(displayNames)
  names(out) <- displayNames
  out
}

for (moduleName in sort(names(model$moduleDefinitions))) {
  moduleDef <- model$moduleDefinitions[[moduleName]]
  moduleVersion <- as.character(model$manifest$modules[[moduleName]])

  cat("## ", moduleName, " (", moduleVersion, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("**Prefix:** ", moduleDef$prefix, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("**Tables:** ", length(moduleDef$tables), "\n\n", sep = "")

  for (tbl in moduleDef$tables) {
    cat("### ", tbl$name, "\n\n", sep = "")

    if (!is.null(tbl$description) && nzchar(tbl$description)) {
      cat(tbl$description, "\n\n")
    }

    fieldRows <- lapply(tbl$fields, function(field) {
      data.frame(
        name = fieldValueToText(field$name),
        type = fieldValueToText(field$type),
        description = fieldValueToText(field$description),
        is_primary_key = if (isTRUE(field$is_primary_key)) "Yes" else "No",
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    })

    fieldDf <- do.call(rbind, fieldRows)
    names(fieldDf) <- c("Name", "Type", "Description", "Primary Key")
    cat(knitr::kable(fieldDf), sep = "\n", "\n\n")
  }
}
```
